method: Country FE. Two-step residualization: (1) regress log_GDP on education with country FE to get GDP residuals (GDP not explained by education), (2) use residuals to predict LE(T+25). Compares education R², raw GDP R², and residualized GDP R². Entry-cohort with ceiling. T=1960-1990, lag=25. Three education levels: primary, lower secondary, upper secondary.
